WITH streaks AS (
  SELECT 
    c.country_code_2,
    c.insert_date,
    DATE(c.insert_date) AS insert_date_only,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.country_code_2 ORDER BY c.insert_date) AS row_num
  FROM cities c
  WHERE c.insert_date >= '2022-06-01' AND c.insert_date < '2022-07-01'
),
grouped_streaks AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    insert_date_only,
    row_num,
    DATE(insert_date_only, '-' || row_num || ' days') AS streak_group
  FROM streaks
),
streak_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    c...

WITH streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        c.country_code_2,
        c.insert_date,
        julianday(c.insert_date) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.country_code_2 ORDER BY c.insert_date) AS grp
    FROM cities c
    WHERE c.insert_date >= '2022-06-01' AND c.insert_date < '2022-07-01'
),
consecutive_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        country_code_2,
        grp,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM streaks
    GROUP BY country_code_2, grp
),
